lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.
This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior and interior show significant wear and damage. Several mechanical components require repair and maintenance.

This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant rust and several large dents. The interior is heavily worn with tears in the upholstery. There are mechanical issues that require repair for the vehicle to be fully operational.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic attention. The exterior shows its age with several large dents, noticeable rust spots along the rocker panels, and clear coat failure across the hood and roof. Inside, the cabin has seen better days; the driver's seat is heavily torn, the headliner is sagging, and there are persistent odors and stains throughout the upholstery. Mechanically, the car starts but runs roughly, with a visible oil leak and a suspension that feels loose and worn. Several dashboard warning lights are illuminated, and the air conditioning is currently non-functional. This car is being sold strictly as-is and is recommended only for those looking for a major project or a donor vehicle for parts.

Step into automotive perfection! This car is in absolute mint condition, appearing and performing as if it just rolled off the assembly line. Every detail has been meticulously cared for, from the flawless paint to the pristine interior. Truly a rare find for those who demand the absolute best!

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been well-maintained throughout its ownership. The mechanical systems, including the engine and transmission, are performing reliably with no known issues. The exterior shows some minor signs of normal wear, such as a few light surface scratches and small stone chips on the hood. Inside, the cabin is clean and comfortable, though there is some light wear on the upholstery. It’s a dependable car that offers a great balance of performance and value.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, offering a premier balance of performance and long-term reliability. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical integrity and features a well-preserved aesthetic both inside and out. Representing a sophisticated choice for the discerning driver, this vehicle stands as a testament to consistent care and responsible ownership. We invite you to experience the quality and refined handling that define this exceptional offering.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and she’s been absolute gold to me. It's in really solid shape—super reliable, runs like a dream, and has been well-loved and maintained over the years. This is the perfect find for someone looking for a dependable daily driver that still looks great pulling into the driveway. Come take it for a spin, I just know you're going to love it as much as I have!

This 997.1 Carrera features the naturally aspirated 3.6L flat-six M96 power plant, delivering linear torque across the rev range via VarioCam Plus valve timing. The 6-speed Getrag manual transmission offers precise engagement, paired with a rear-wheel-drive layout for optimal steering feedback and weight distribution. Recent preventative maintenance includes an updated IMS bearing and a high-flow water pump to ensure cooling system integrity. Good condition. Runs well. Clean interior. Recent maintenance completed.

This meticulously cared-for vehicle offers a perfect blend of reliability and style. The exterior boasts a vibrant finish with only minor, superficial wear consistent with its well-maintained history. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean, featuring supple seating, a pristine dashboard, and a suite of fully operational tech features. Mechanically, it performs beautifully, with a responsive engine and a smooth transmission that has been serviced regularly. With plenty of tread left on the tires and a solid service record, this car is ready for the road today. It represents a fantastic opportunity for a buyer seeking a dependable, high-quality ride that has been treated with respect.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been well-loved, making it perfect for someone who wants a reliable car without the brand-new price tag. It runs beautifully and is totally ready for its next adventure with you. Feel free to reach out if you want to take it for a spin!

Offering a mechanically sound E46 M3 powered by the high-revving S54 inline-six with individual throttle bodies. This example features the desirable Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox and a factory-spec limited-slip differential. Critical preventative maintenance has been addressed, including a comprehensive VANOS service and rear subframe reinforcement to ensure structural rigidity. The chassis dynamics remain sharp with firm bushings and responsive damping. While the aesthetic reflects honest use, the powertrain exhibits excellent thermal management and consistent oil pressure, making this a driver-focused machine ready for the apex.
Used car in good condition. Runs well. Clean interior and exterior. Routine maintenance complete. Reliable daily driver.

This 2019 Audi A6 Premium Plus offers a perfect blend of performance and sophisticated luxury. The exterior is finished in a timeless Mythos Black Metallic that still holds a deep, glossy luster, complemented by 19-inch multi-spoke wheels. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of craftsmanship, featuring Nougat Brown leather upholstery and fine grain ash wood inlays. It comes fully equipped with the dual-screen MMI touch response system, a Bang & Olufsen 3D Premium Sound System, and a panoramic sunroof that fills the space with natural light. Mechanically, this vehicle has been handled with care, boasting a consistent service history and a recent set of performance tires. This vehicle has been exceptionally well-maintained and presents beautifully, striking the perfect balance between luxury and reliability. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, with only the minor, expected road wear consistent with careful use. Inside, the cabin is a clean, smoke-free environment featuring supple leather seating that shows very little wear and a dashboard where every button and digital display functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health; the engine pulls strong, the transmission shifts seamlessly, and the suspension provides a quiet, composed ride. It has been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer's schedule, including a recent oil change and a comprehensive multi-point inspection. This is a turn-key vehicle, ready to provide its next owner with years of dependable service and driving pleasure. All original manuals and two sets of keys are included.
